title: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
excerpt: Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac. I'm really excited about his new project, which wraps MLX in …
content_html:
21st July 2026 - Link Blog

Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac (via) Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac.

I'm really excited about his new project, which wraps MLX in a full macOS desktop application. It's similar in shape to LM Studio, providing both a chat interface and a localhost API server for accessing models.

The app picked up MLX models I had already tried that were present in my Hugging Face cache directory, which was a nice touch.

content_html_zh:
2026 年 7 月 21 日 - 链接博客

Nativ：在 Mac 上本地运行 AI 模型（来自） Prince Canuma 是出色的 MLX-VLM Python 库的开发者，该库用于在 Mac 上使用 MLX 运行视觉 LLM。

我对他的新项目感到非常兴奋，该项目将 MLX 封装在完整的 macOS 桌面应用程序中。 它的形状与 LM Studio 类似，提供聊天界面和用于访问模型的本地主机 API 服务器。

该应用程序拾取了我已经尝试过的 MLX 模型，这些模型存在于我的 Hugging Face 缓存目录中，这是一个很好的接触。
